_meta.scout: ReelGrants (working name — verify domain before committing)
_meta.description: Seed dataset of real film/creator grants, fellowships, labs, and funds. Powers the free public tracker and seeds the engine's diff store. Each row should carry a last_verified date in production; re-confirm status before flipping a row to 'open'.
_meta.verification_note: Compiled from primary funder pages + reputable aggregators. Rows marked status 'verify' need re-confirmation. NEVER publish a stale hard deadline as if it were live — show the typical window instead.
primary_sources_to_poll: No Film School seasonal grant lists (quarterly; 403s on bots — needs real-browser ingest)
Individual Submittable-hosted funder portals (Firelight, Chicken & Egg, Catapult, SFFILM, Redford, AFS, Stowe) — expose open/close status cleanly

grants.eligibility: Emerging & established creators worldwide; doc film/series/podcast on climate
